# Legacy MIT-SCIENCE-PAPER Content

**Source:** `MIT-SCIENCE-PAPER/Full project/` (the original project tree before Phase 7 consolidation)

**Status:** ARCHIVED — Do not edit. Use canonical locations instead.

---

## Subfolders

| Folder | Original Location | What It Contains |
|--------|-------------------|------------------|
| `documentation/` | `03_Documentation/` | Technical docs, navigation guides, project management files, support guides |
| `governance/` | `05_Governance/` | Compliance templates, funding proposals, planning docs, submission letters |
| `translations/` | `06_Translations/` | Portuguese translations of docs, manuscript, and guides |
| `data/` | `07_Data/` | Processed data files (communities_45.csv) |
| `archive_snapshots/` | `08_Archive/` | Historical archive including old manuscripts, legacy documentation, submission backups |
| `coding_parts/` | `Coding parts/` | Early coding notes and structure files |
| `project_root_docs/` | Root-level .md files | Legacy docs from the Full project root (improvement trackers, strategy docs, bibliographic analysis) |

---

## Where Things Moved To (Canonical)

| Content | Now Lives At |
|---------|-------------|
| Application code | `code_unified/app_codebase/geesp-angola/` |
| Manuscript (SOL.tex) | `manuscript_unified/science_manuscript/manuscript/SOL.tex` |
| Bibliography | `manuscript_unified/science_manuscript/manuscript/referencias.bib` |
| Operations/DevOps | `code_unified/operations_devops/` |
| Admin reports | `repo_admin/reports/` |
